flags.concern: Duplicate-as-new-generation: Step 6 removes the current query invalidations but does not preserve `segments.parents(...)`. `enqueueGenerationsInvalidation(..., scope:'all')` only covers `generations.byShot`, `segments.liveTimeline`, `generations.meta`, `generations.unpositionedCount`, and optional shots/unified invalidation, so parent-segment consumers would stop refreshing after duplication.
flags.evidence: Current hook explicitly invalidates `queryKeys.segments.parents(data.shot_id, data.project_id)` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shots/useDuplicateAsNewGeneration.ts:251-265`. The shared invalidation helper in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/invalidation/useGenerationInvalidation.ts:126-157` does not touch `segments.parents`.

flags.concern: Shot creation files path: Step 3's recommended post-upload hydration is under-scoped. `createShotWithFilesPath` does not currently have any dependency that can fetch a hydrated shot, and `uploadToShot` only returns `{ shotId, generationIds }`, so the plan cannot build the final `Shot` object without also extending the external-drop pipeline or adding a new fetch/RPC dependency.
flags.evidence: `CreateShotWithFilesPathInput` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationTypes.ts:110-130` only provides `queryClient`, `createShot`, and `uploadToShot`. `processDroppedImages` in `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shots/externalImageDrop.ts:352-395` returns only `{ shotId, generationIds }` and no joined generation payloads.

flags.concern: Shot creation tests: The plan does not touch the full test surface that still depends on `createShotWithImage`/`useCreateShotWithImage`. If Step 1 and Step 9 remove that mutation path, several existing tests and mocks will fail unless they are explicitly updated or deleted.
flags.evidence: `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shotCreation/shotCreationAction.test.ts:46-120` still injects and asserts `createShotWithImageMutation`. `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts:29-57` still mocks `useCreateShotWithImage`. `/Users/peteromalley/Documents/reigh-workspace/reigh-app/src/shared/hooks/shots/__tests__/useShotCreation.test.ts:73-130` directly tests `useCreateShotWithImage`.
